title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About MT Educare Global Group:
MT Educare Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare Global Group!
